introSection: Bat Coaster is a travelling steel inverted roller coaster built by Italian manufacturer Pinfari currently owned & operated by Freij Entertainment International.

sections.title: History
sections.content:
It originally opened in 2002 at Nigloland in Dolancourt, Grand Est, France and remained there until it closed in 2006 and was relocated to Antibes Land in Antibes, Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, France. in Antibes Land it operated from 2007 until 2008, when the ride once again was closed and relocated a second time (this time outside France), to Global Village in Dubai, Dubai, United Arab Emirates. Here it was primarily for the Dubai Shopping Festival (DSF) 2009 which ran from January 15, 2009 to February 15, 2009. The coaster was said to run until the end of the season which was February 21, 2009.

In 2011, the roller coaster operated in China.

fullText:
Bat Coaster is a travelling steel inverted roller coaster built by Italian manufacturer Pinfari currently owned & operated by Freij Entertainment International.

It originally opened in 2002 at Nigloland in Dolancourt, Grand Est, France and remained there until it closed in 2006 and was relocated to Antibes Land in Antibes, Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, France. in Antibes Land it operated from 2007 until 2008, when the ride once again was closed and relocated a second time (this time outside France), to Global Village in Dubai, Dubai, United Arab Emirates. Here it was primarily for the Dubai Shopping Festival (DSF) 2009 which ran from January 15, 2009 to February 15, 2009. The coaster was said to run until the end of the season which was February 21, 2009.

In 2011, the roller coaster operated in China.
